creator: des@FreeBSD.org
text:
Your unbound.conf is correct.  Unbound doesn't seem to be getting any requests.  Do you see anything in /var/log/messages about the iterator and validator modules starting?  What does 'local-unbound-control status' say?

Also, since this PR is from October 5: which version are you running?  What was the last known good version?  Have you tried the latest head, which has a newer Unbound?
